title: EvaluationInput
description: Everything a rule's predicate may see for one class slice: the canonical ChangeSet (EntryRef subjects, old/new values, positions), the resolved facts map, MR metadata, and the binding's require: obligation list (ADR-0017 §§2/5/6). Backend-neutral by construction: no field here names a predicate backend (cel, rego, or similar) — a future Rego-backed rule (E11) is representable in the identical input record a CEL-backed rule uses.

require.description: The binding's required obligation names (ADR-0017 §2); a rule's prove.obligation must match one of these for obligation coverage. May be empty for a class with no obligation-proving rules.

entryRef.description: Stable governed-subject identity, e.g. "topic-registry:orders.events.v1" (class:identity, derived from entries.identity.pointer, ADR-0017 §5) or "file:<path>" for file-level subjects.

path.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer within the file; empty string for a whole-file event.

old.description: Pre-change value at path; absent for kind: add.

new.description: Post-change value at path; absent for kind: delete.

position.description: Anchors a finding to an inline forge thread (ADR-0011 amendment 2).

facts.description: Keyed by provider name, then output name (docs/planning/predicate-scope.md "facts" field).

state.description: Distinct machine states, never a silently absent key (Spike C, OQ-17).

sensitive.description: Copied from the provider declaration's sensitive flag (schemas/provider/v1alpha1). DecisionRecord/PresentationModel must never carry this fact's raw value when true.

value.description: Present only when state is resolved.

reason.description: Operator-readable cause for a non-resolved state.
